problem id: aa0f7c7d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  11101011 -> 11011110
  00001010 -> 11100000
  00111000 -> 10000011
  11010110 -> 10101101
  01000000 -> 00000100
  00000110 -> 10100000
  01110110 -> 10100111
  00111011 -> 11010011
  00010011 -> 01010001

query: 01010100
predicted answer: 11000101
